task_completion.description: Three tracks are created and named 'Cue 1 Preshow', 'Cue 2 Prologue', and 'Cue 3 Intermission'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the track headers or control panels on the left side of the audio editor to verify the three specific track names.

task_completion.description: An audio clip is placed on 'Cue 1 Preshow' at 00:00:00 with a 5-second fade-out at the end.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The waveform on the first track starts exactly at the 0:00 mark on the timeline. The end of this clip should show a visible fade-out envelope (a line sloping downwards to zero volume over the last 5 seconds of the clip).

task_completion.description: An audio clip is placed on 'Cue 2 Prologue' at 00:02:00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The waveform on the second track starts exactly at the 2:00 (2 minutes) mark on the timeline ruler.

task_completion.description: An audio clip is placed on 'Cue 3 Intermission' at 00:05:00, and the track gain is set to -10 dB.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The waveform on the third track starts exactly at the 5:00 (5 minutes) mark. The gain/volume slider or numerical input in the track header for 'Cue 3 Intermission' shows a value around -10 dB (acceptable between -16 dB and -4 dB).

task_completion.description: Session markers 'House Lights Down' at 00:01:55 and 'Act 1 End' at 00:04:55 are added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the marker/label track (usually at the top or bottom of the timeline). Verify there is a marker labeled 'House Lights Down' just before the 2:00 mark (at 1:55) and another labeled 'Act 1 End' just before the 5:00 mark (at 4:55).
The application window title bar shows a saved project name (without an unsaved changes asterisk), or there is evidence of the agent successfully completing a 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical audio editor (e.g., Audacity, Ardour, Reaper) to configure the session.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an actual Digital Audio Workstation (DAW) or audio editor interface with tracks, waveforms, and a timeline, rather than terminal commands or a text editor modifying project files directly.

integrity.description: The agent loaded actual audio files rather than creating empty clips.
integrity.visual_evidence: The clips on the timeline display actual audio waveforms (peaks and valleys), indicating the .wav files were successfully imported.

integrity.description: The agent manually interacted with the application to place clips and markers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps of the agent interacting with the timeline, track headers, file import dialogs, and marker dialogs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Track names must be exactly 'Cue 1 Preshow', 'Cue 2 Prologue', and 'Cue 3 Intermission'. Cue 1 starts at 00:00:00. Cue 2 starts at 00:02:00. Cue 3 starts at 00:05:00. Marker 1 ('House Lights Down') is at 00:01:55. Marker 2 ('Act 1 End') is at 00:04:55. The gain for Cue 3 should be set to -10 dB (the verifier accepts a range between -16.0 and -4.0 dB). A 5-second fade-out must be applied to the end of Cue 1.
